raw: 1 Central Wharf Boston, MA 02110 617-973-5200 Get Directions Updated 03/16/2026 Pass is good for 50% off per person, up to 4 people. Passbook Code is PS143901 and library ID is 324077. The New England Aquarium will be closed to the public on Wednesday, April 8. Passes for April 8 will be honored up to a week after the original date. In addition, in the event of an Aquarium closure due to inclement weather, we will honor passes up to a week after the original date as well. Visit museum website for more information.
